series_metadata.series_description: Grants Management Application, Expenditure Reports, Notice of Award, Budget Revisions, General Correspondence to/from the Agency, Payment Transmittals. These records are comprised for both state and federal grants awarded to Public Health Department and Private non-profit agencies administered thru the Ohio Department of Health, Office of Grants Management.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office area. 2 years in or state and federal audits have been conducted, audit reports released and audit resolutions issued or resolved. State Archives will review, if not transferred State Archives
